text: The commission may contract with a landowner for the use of land as a disposal site for dredged material.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 51. Tex. Coastal Waterway Act
##### § 51.012 — Contracts with Landowners

The commission may contract with a landowner for the use of land as a disposal site for dredged material.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 191, Sec. 3, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.*

subsections.text: The commission may contract with a landowner for the use of land as a disposal site for dredged material.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 191, Sec. 3, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.
